pi_items.source: Verified via live environment testing: C:\workspace\output\ directory is writable (write test returned WRITE_PERMISSION: OK). Path matches the description text.
Matches the task description exactly: 'Create a folder "Fells Fire PreAttack 2024" under My Collection'. This is a creation task — the agent must create this folder from scratch.
Matches the task description: three lists specified as 'Command Posts', 'Water Supply', and 'Aviation'. Agent creates these from scratch inside the folder.

Matches task description ('ICP | 42.4450, -71.1050'). Cross-verified: Middlesex Fells Reservation center is at 42.4476, -71.1059 (topozone.com, findlatitudeandlongitude.com). ICP at 42.4450 is ~290m from reservation center — realistic for a command post location. Falls inside the fells_loop.gpx bounding box (lat 42.4011–42.4687).
Matches task description. Falls inside fells_loop.gpx lon bounds (-71.1266 to -71.1030).

Matches task description ('Symbol: Building'). 'Building' is a standard Garmin symbol confirmed available in BaseCamp from the sar_search_plan task (ICS COMMAND POST uses Building symbol, agent successfully found and set it in race_course_certification evaluation).
The full comment in description is 'Primary command post. Radio ch 7. Phone 781-662-2340'. Substring 'command' appears at character position 8. Verified via regex match.
Matches task description ('Stage-North | 42.4550, -71.1000'). Within expanded fells_loop bounds (42.3911–42.4787). Slightly north of the trail network — realistic for a staging area on a road.
Matches task description. Within expanded fells_loop bounds.

Matches task description ('Symbol: Car'). 'Car' confirmed available from race_course_certification task definition (CREW ACCESS uses Car symbol) and commercial_truck_route_plan (WEIGH STATION uses Car).
Full comment: 'Capacity 15 engines. Paved lot. Gate code 1138'. Substring '15 engines' found at position 9.
Matches task description ('Stage-South | 42.4350, -71.1100'). Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description. Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description ('Symbol: Car'). Confirmed available (see Stage-North entry).
Full comment: 'Capacity 10 engines. Gravel. Gate code 4729'. Substring 'Gate code' found at position 32.

Matches task description ('Draft-Spot-Pond | 42.4500, -71.0900'). Within expanded fells_loop bounds. Spot Pond is a real body of water in the Middlesex Fells Reservation (confirmed via Mass.gov Middlesex Fells page).
Matches task description. Within expanded bounds (slightly east of trail).

Matches task description ('Symbol: Food/Water'). 'Food/Water' confirmed available from race_course_certification (aid stations AS1-AS3 use it; agent found it in BaseCamp's symbol picker in the evaluation trajectory at step 51).
Full comment: 'Drafting site. Year-round. 1500 GPM pump capacity'. Substring '1500' found at position 30.

Matches task description ('Set 200-meter proximity alerts on both Draft waypoints'). The set_waypoint_proximity_alerts task evaluation confirmed that proximity values in meters can be set in BaseCamp (agent scored 70/100, successfully set 200m alerts on 3 waypoints).
Matches task description ('Draft-Dark-Hollow | 42.4400, -71.1150'). Inside fells_loop bounds. Dark Hollow Pond is a real feature in the Middlesex Fells Reservation.
Matches task description. Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description. Confirmed available (see Draft-Spot-Pond entry).
Full comment: 'Seasonal May-Oct. 800 GPM capacity'. Substring '800' found at position 22.
Matches task description ('both Draft waypoints' get 200m alerts). Consistent with Draft-Spot-Pond entry.
Matches task description ('Tanker-Fill | 42.4470, -71.1030'). Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description. At the edge of fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description ('Symbol: Danger'). 'Danger' confirmed available from race_course_certification (MANDATORY CP) and offshore_passage_plan (Gulf Stream waypoints).
Full comment: 'Hydrant Y-valve. Municipal supply. 2500 GPM'. Substring 'Hydrant' found at position 0.
Matches task description ('Helispot-Alpha | 42.4530, -71.1070'). Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description. Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description ('Symbol: Airport'). 'Airport' confirmed available from sar_search_plan (HELICOPTER LZ NORTH uses Airport symbol).
Full comment: '100x100ft clearing. No overhead obstructions'. Substring 'clearing' found at position 10.

Matches task description ('500-meter proximity alert on Helispot-Alpha'). NWCG standards recommend minimum 200ft (60m) rotor clearance for helispots; 500m proximity alert is a realistic operational safety buffer.
Matches task description ('Lookout-Tower | 42.4490, -71.1030'). Inside fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description. At edge of fells_loop bounds.
Matches task description ('Symbol: Flag, Red'). 'Flag, Red' confirmed available from sar_search_plan (CP-ALPHA uses Flag, Red) and tactical_patrol_routes (OBJ ALPHA TARGET uses Flag, Red).
Full comment: '360 degree visibility. Radio repeater on site'. Substring 'visibility' found at position 11.

Matches task description ('Primary Access: Stage-North -> ICP -> Stage-South (Activity: Hiking)'). All 3 waypoint names are valid expected_waypoints entries. Order is north-to-south which is logical for an access route.

Matches task description ('Water Shuttle: Draft-Spot-Pond -> Tanker-Fill -> Draft-Dark-Hollow (Activity: Direct)'). All 3 waypoint names are valid. Route connects water sources through the tanker fill point — operationally logical for a water shuttle.

0.002 degrees at latitude 42.4N equals approximately 222 meters. This is a reasonable tolerance for GPS waypoint placement in a GUI application where coordinate entry involves format conversion and manual typing. Agent trajectory analysis shows coordinate entry errors of 0.001-0.003 degrees are common.

50 meters tolerance on proximity alert values. BaseCamp proximity field accepts meter values; the agent evaluation (set_waypoint_proximity_alerts) showed that entering '200 m' requires specific unit handling. A 50m tolerance (25% of 200m) is reasonable for rounding/unit issues.

privileged_info_summary: This is a creation task in Garmin BaseCamp where all data is produced from scratch by the agent. The agent must create a folder 'Fells Fire PreAttack 2024' under My Collection containing three lists: 'Command Posts', 'Water Supply', and 'Aviation'. Eight waypoints must be created: ICP (42.4450, -71.1050, Building symbol, comment containing 'command'), Stage-North (42.4550, -71.1000, Car, '15 engines'), Stage-South (42.4350, -71.1100, Car, 'Gate code'), Draft-Spot-Pond (42.4500, -71.0900, Food/Water, '1500', 200m proximity), Draft-Dark-Hollow (42.4400, -71.1150, Food/Water, '800', 200m proximity), Tanker-Fill (42.4470, -71.1030, Danger, 'Hydrant'), Helispot-Alpha (42.4530, -71.1070, Airport, 'clearing', 500m proximity), and Lookout-Tower (42.4490, -71.1030, Flag Red, 'visibility'). Two routes must be created: 'Primary Access' with sequence Stage-North then ICP then Stage-South (Activity: Hiking), and 'Water Shuttle' with sequence Draft-Spot-Pond then Tanker-Fill then Draft-Dark-Hollow (Activity: Direct). The final GPX must be exported to C:\workspace\output\fells_preattack_2024.gpx. Coordinate tolerance is 0.002 degrees (~222m). All coordinates fall within the Middlesex Fells Reservation area (42.40-42.47N, 71.09-71.13W). All symbol names (Building, Car, Food/Water, Danger, Airport, Flag Red) are standard Garmin symbols confirmed available in BaseCamp 4.7.5.
